positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast illustration of a mythical forest scene. Central composition features a glowing, bioluminescent flora forming an ornate, stylized archway. Vines, ethereal glowing mushrooms, and celestial moon fragments weave together. The style should be intricate neo-Victorian etching mixed with deep jungle kawaii aesthetics. Use deep indigo, emerald green, and luminous gold accents against a midnight black background. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, highly decorative, suitable for direct apparel printing, maximalist design, Zazzle style.
negative: blur, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, messy lines, noise, artifact, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, low detail, bad anatomy, bokeh
